title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
author: openai-blog
raw_description: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.
summary: OpenAI为ChatGPT Enterprise推出新的使用分析和支出控制功能，帮助企业管理成本并自信地扩展AI应用。
analysis_note: 企业级功能更新，实用性强但技术深度一般，适合关注AI部署管理的读者。
